---
title: "Presentations"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
---

<!-- Talks and posters. Flat list. To add an entry, copy a
     <div class="pub">…</div> block, update data-year, and edit
     title / venue. Numbers like [1], [2] are generated automatically
     by CSS — no need to renumber when adding, removing, or reordering
     entries. Use &#42; (HTML entity) for any "corresponding author"
     asterisk. -->

<div class="pub-list">

<div class="pub" data-year="2025">
<div>
<div class="pub-title">Mega vs. Meta in omics data integration: applications and methodological innovations.</div>
<div class="pub-venue">Biostatistics Conference, Chongqing</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Invited Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2025</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2025">
<div>
<div class="pub-title">Statistical assessment of data normalization for sample clustering using microRNA sequencing.</div>
<div class="pub-venue">ICSA Applied Statistics Symposium, University of Connecticut</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Invited Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2025</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2025">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="https://aacrjournals.org/clincancerres/article/31/12_Supplement/P1-11-01/752609">Abstract P1-11-01: Immune infiltration correlates with transcriptomic subtypes in primary ER+ invasive lobular breast cancer</a></div>
<div class="pub-authors">3rd author</div>
<div class="pub-venue">San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2025</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2024">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="downloads/presentations/2024_EcoSta.pdf">Mutual information for detecting multi-class biomarkers when integrating multiple omics studies.</a></div>
<div class="pub-venue">7th International Conference on Econometrics and Statistics, Beijing</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Invited Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2024</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2024">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="downloads/presentations/2023_hk_cascam.pdf">Systems approach for congruence and selection of cancer models towards precision medicine.</a></div>
<div class="pub-venue">ICSA China Conference, Wuhan &nbsp;·&nbsp; Joint Bioconductor Asia &amp; Hong Kong Bioinformatics Symposium</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Invited Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2024</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2023">
<div>
<div class="pub-title">Transcriptomic congruence and selection of representative cancer models towards precision medicine.</div>
<div class="pub-venue">ENAR Spring Meeting, Nashville</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Contributed Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2023</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2022">
<div>
<div class="pub-title">CGMM: An algorithm for constrained model-based clustering.</div>
<div class="pub-venue">ICSA Applied Statistics Symposium, Florida &nbsp;·&nbsp; Symposium on Data Science &amp; Statistics, Pittsburgh &nbsp;·&nbsp; ASA Pittsburgh Spring Banquet</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2022</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2022">
<div>
<div class="pub-title">Congruence analysis to optimally select representative cell lines for breast cancer histological subtypes.</div>
<div class="pub-venue">NISS Graduate Student Research Conference</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2022</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2021">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="downloads/presentations/2021_deans_day_slnb.pdf">Outcomes after sentinel lymph node biopsy and radiation therapy in elderly women with ER+, early stage breast cancer.</a></div>
<div class="pub-venue">Pitt GSPH Dean's Day</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2021</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2019">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="downloads/presentations/2019_ICSA_normalization.pdf">Statistical assessment of depth normalization methods for microRNA sequencing.</a></div>
<div class="pub-venue">11th ICSA International Conference, Hangzhou</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Invited Talk</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2019</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2024">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1158/1538-7445.SABCS23-PO1-14-09">Abstract PO1-14-09: Age-related remodeling of the systemic and breast microenvironment promotes a tumor-permissive locale for ER+ breast cancer in older women.</a></div>
<div class="pub-authors">2nd author</div>
<div class="pub-venue">San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2024</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2020">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/81/4_Supplement/PS11-02/648201/Abstract-PS11-02-Comprehensive-comparative">Abstract PS11-02: Comprehensive comparative analysis of invasive ductal and lobular breast cancer cases in Great Lakes Breast Cancer Consortium.</a></div>
<div class="pub-authors">3rd author</div>
<div class="pub-venue">San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2020</span>
</div>

<div class="pub" data-year="2020">
<div>
<div class="pub-title"><a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/81/4_Supplement/PS1-10/648032/Abstract-PS1-10-Outcomes-after-sentinel-lymph-node">Abstract PS1-10: Outcomes after sentinel lymph node biopsy and radiation therapy in women over 70 years old with ER+, HER2&minus;, clinically node negative breast cancer.</a></div>
<div class="pub-authors">3rd author</div>
<div class="pub-venue">San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium</div>
<div class="pub-venue-extra">Poster</div>
</div>
<span class="pub-year">2020</span>
</div>

</div><!-- /.pub-list -->
